description: Singapore is a dynamic city-state known for its perfect blend of modernity and tradition. It is renowned for its pristine cleanliness, efficient infrastructure, and multicultural environment. As one of the world’s leading financial hubs, Singapore is home to impressive skyscrapers, luxury shopping malls, and innovative architecture, such as the iconic Marina Bay Sands and the futuristic Gardens by the Bay. The city is also famous for its diverse culinary scene, from hawker centers serving local favorites like Hainanese chicken rice and chili crab to Michelin-starred fine dining. Visitors can explore cultural neighborhoods like Chinatown, Little India, and Kampong Glam, where they can experience rich traditions and vibrant festivals. Despite its small size, Singapore offers a wealth of experiences, from exploring nature reserves and pristine beaches to enjoying world-class entertainment and shopping. With a perfect blend of green spaces, cutting-edge technology, and a welcoming atmosphere, Singapore is a must-visit destination for travelers seeking both excitement and tranquility.
cost_includes:
Return Economy Airfare BOM-BOM  
Singapore Tourist Visa

Sentosa (Cable Car, Images of Singapore,Madam Tussads ,Boat Ride,unlimate film star Experience,4D Marvel Show,Wings of time (Standard)).

Travel goodies

cost_excludes:
Any meals other than those mentioned above included. 	
Airfare 	
GST 5% 	
Any portage at airports and hotels, tips, insurance, wine, mineral water,  telephone charges, and all Items of personal nature. 	
Any services not specifically mentioned in the inclusions.

mal-Functions, political disturbances etc.
